content: The 2024-2025 SOTA push to tier active learning agent memory (episodic, semantic, procedural) for long-horizon tasks can be repurposed to build a generalizable agent framework that dynamically routes uncertainty-based sample selection to the right memory tier, rather than treating active learning as a one-size-fits-all pipeline across all agent types. This creates a modular active learning layer that works for embodied, conversational, and predictive agents uniformly.
